chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No. 287 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ______________________________________________________________________ Hearing (Priority) Case: 1. For order on CMA No. 326/21 (U/A) 2. For order on CMA No. 327/21 (withdrawal) 3. For order on CMA No. 3609/15 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of Main Case. 5. For hearing of CMA No. 3610/15 (stay) --------- 29.01.2021 Mr. Abid Naseem, Advocate for Appellant. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. ----------------- 1. Granted. 2. This is an application for unconditional withdrawal of this Appeal duly supported with the affidavit of the authorized person of the Appellant. Accordingly, the same is allowed. Appeal stands dismissed as withdrawn with pending applications. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
